entry.title: Metroid Fusion v1.22.3
entry.content:
## Changes
* PONR Checks should be fixed (@NPCPotPie)
Setup guide link: [here](https://github.com/StalledStorm/ArchipelagoMine/wiki/Metroid-Fusion-Setup-Guide)

entry.title: SMW: Spicy Mycena Waffles v1.3.9
entry.content: pancage ## Info * [Information](https://thelx5.github.io/smw/) * [Full Changelog](https://thelx5.github.io/smw/changelog/#1.3.9) ## Changes * Fixed Star World 5 level tile not being excluded from swapped exits when it should always be excluded * Fixed failed generations with transitions are off and teleports shuffle are on * Fixed rare cases where teleport/transition shuffle will map two entrances to the same exit * Enemy Shuffle updates * Larry's Castle second room no longer allows Pokeys, Green Boucing Koopas, Mega Moles or Dino Torches

entry.title: Baldur's Gate 3 v0.4.5
entry.content:
Fixes initialization issues and deathlink issues.
Note: This REQUIRES BG3 Mod 0.5.0.

entry.title: Tevi v0.7.1
entry.content:
## 1.5.1 fixes + Unicorn fixed + excluding all Traps fixed
## Changelog v1.4.8 -> 1.5.0
+ Traps -- Reverse Camera -- Yeet -- Double Time -- Low Jump Height -- Debuff -- Invisible Tevi
+ New Display option for Itempop ups + removed Money locations from pool when not needed + Automatic Hint system that display priority hints from AP + Quickdrops gain 1 additional charge when hitting + Disabled Keyboard / Gamepad inputs when a Textfield is selected in the Randomizer Menu + Fixed randomized background / music / bosses(?) + Quickdrop dmg changed to -> ( base dmg * MATK Pot ) + Chain -> removed potion scaling from Combo counter increased 1 dmg per chain hit + Quickdrop have a internal cooldown of 0.08s
### Logic
+ Removed CC Shop # 18 + Event location missing Logic + Teleporter Name display correctly + Ulskan Village Area to Plague Forest Exit -> logic fix + Hand exchange fixed + Item name fixed for Money blocks + DreamKeeper - Money Room X: 24 Y: 21 -> removed unreachable condition (Clusterbomb)
### ApWorld + Location and Item IDs are now hard coded and reduce to a lower number + Potions move to Client `Bonus Start` tab + Ensure that at least 16 potion each are available at all times, except rainbow bunny potion

entry.title: Deltarune v2.0.0+pre.release.1b
entry.content: v2.0.0+pre-release-1a never existed trust

entry.title: Manual_BlockTales_WolfBoi008 v6.0.0.post2
entry.content: # Known Issues None for now... # Changelog - **Fixed the issue with the events not working. Generation should always succeed now.** (Thank you @Seafo!) - Added Chapter 5 Items and Cards.

entry.title: Bomberman Hero v0.2.3
entry.content: ## Updates from last release - Added extra support for the [Bomberman Hero Poptracker Pack](https://github.com/Happyhappyism/Bomberman_Hero_Tracker/releases) - Fixed a logic error with Millian Road

entry.title: Bomberman The Second Attack v1.0.0
entry.content:
## Updates from last release - ROM adjuster is now built into the apworld - General stability update - Fixed a few logic errors - [Poptracker pack](https://github.com/Pikachu979/Bomberman-64-The-Second-Attack-Poptracker/releases/tag/V0.0.1)
## Notes about the ROM adjuster todo

entry.title: Manual_BlockTales_WolfBoi008 v6.0.0rc1
entry.content: # Known Issues - I forgot to change the Chapter 5 Goal to beating Chapter 5. Whoops. Will be fixed in the next RC, whenever I release it. # Changelog - **Finished the remainder of Chapter 5's main content.** - Added a Check for the Ankh Item that's in the Temple of the Red Sun. (FNaF) - There are now 60 BUX in the Item pool instead of 50, since the game now has that many as of DEMO 5. - Card counts were increased as needed. - Added a Check for the Pirate Spirit enemy that Trotter summons in his boss battle. - Added some missing Cutscenes and other Checks regarding Cruel King DX. - Added Levelsanity for Chapters 4 and 5 and adjusted the existing Levelsanity following FNaF's documentation. - This is subject to change depending on player feedback. - **Tweaked the logic of some Checks to remove _all_ instances of `{CanReachLocation()}`, to minimize gen time as much as possible.** - Potentially a few other miscellaneous changes. # What's Missing? - Chatsanity for most of Chapter 4 + some of Chapter 5 - This may not be in 6.0.0, to save me some sanity... - Checks related to Finn McCool - I have yet to beat him myself, admittedly... - Checks related to the Mutant - I've already beaten it once, but I need to beat it a second time for logging purposes. - Anything else I may not be thinking of...?

entry.title: Okami HD v0.4.5
entry.content:
## What's Changed * Add archipelago.json by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/62 * Fix Agata Logic Warp by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/64 * Fix Sasa Logic Warp * Rename Orbs for clarity by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/65 * Fix Shop locations creation when there's more than 1 shop per file by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/67 * Revert Shop Creation Fix by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/68 * Canine warriors and gale shrine access logic rework by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/74 * Rebalance junk fill weights * Set locations that don't give their randomized items and locations that cause softlocks to always give junk items * has_element_portable_source rule rework to take into account progressive weapons & secret techs.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/compare/0.4.4...0.4.5

entry.title: Skyward Sword v0.5.6rc1
entry.content:
## v0.5.6 Pre-Release [Alpha]
This version is only compatible with Archipelago 0.6.7 or greater!!
Report any issues to the Skyward Sword channel under custom worlds in the AP discord server.
For setup instructions, visit [the SS AP Setup Guide](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/blob/ss/worlds/ss/docs/setup_en.md).
## What has changed? (v0.5.6) - Logic revamp, again! This one allows for full implementation of full entrance rando. The `all-entrances` option for entrance rando is disabled for the time being, but dungeon entrance rando is still available and uses the new entrance mapping ( by bcats - see [#48](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/48) ) - This will allow time for testing of the new entrance mapping while fixing final bugs with entrance rando before full release - New hints, including spirit of the sword, barren, path, and entrance hints, with several new distributions ( by bcats - also see [#48](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/48) ) - New hint options: precise item hints / precise hints / explicit hints - Breath link, an option like death link, but monkaStamina ( by YourAverageLink - see [#43](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/43) ) - Option to remove textboxes for minor items ( by YourAverageLink - see [#45](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/45) ) - Text colors in in-game text buffer ( by YourAverageLink - see [#39](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/39) ) - Console client fixes ( by YourAverageLink / lepelog - see [#44](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/44) and [#40](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/40) ) - Fix for hint inaccuracies during patching and unitest fixes ( by Harmjan387 - see [#47](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/47) ) - Fix for item link crash when patching ( by Connor308 - see [#35](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/35) ) - Logic fixes ( by Harmjan387 - see [#41](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/41) ) - Decreased default value for progression balancing from 70 to 65
## What has changed? (v0.5.5) - Logic revamp, no longer using eval() function, which brings us closer to core eligibility - Updated setup guide - new tutorial video by bcats - Fixed client connection bug regarding hints ( by Harmjan387 - see [#42](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/42) ) - Fixed logic bug regarding Eldin starting statues ( by bcats - see [this commit](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/commit/52d7a057c3b80d911d79de70e4e6d53681d65ff9) )
## What has changed? (v0.5.4) - WII CONSOLE SUPPORT! ( by YourAverageLink - see [#27](https://github.com/battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/27) ) - For more info, see [setting up your wii console](https://github.com/YourAverageLink/SSArchipelago/blob/console-socket/worlds/ss/docs/setup_en.md#setting-up-your-client-wii-console) in the SSAP Setup Guide - Fixed an issue with generation failure in AP 0.6.5 ( by Harmjan387 - see [#31](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/31) ) - Fixed an issue with the lumpy pumpkin chandelier send flag ( by Harmjan387 - see [#32](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/32) ) - Fixed an issue with death link on console ( by YourAverageLink - see [#34](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/34) ) - Added Goddess cube autotracking (by Harmjan387 and YourAverageLink - see [#33](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/33) ) - Added console auto-reconnect ( by YourAverageLink - see [#37](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/37) )
## What has changed? (v0.5.3) - Added a client command to toggle deathlink mid-game ( by Harmjan 387 - see [#29](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/29) ) - Fixed plando items breaking generation ( by Harmjan 387 - see [#29](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/29) )
## What has changed? (v0.5.2) - Several fixes for generation errors ( by Harmjan387 - see [#24](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/24), [#25](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/25), and [#26](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/26) ) - Completion condition fix ( by LelouBil - see [#22](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/22) ) - Shuffled Batreaux Counts ( by Battlecats59 - see [#19](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/19) ) - Options including vanilla (5-80), half (2-40), random (1-80), random-high (30-80), and random-low (1-50) - Batreaux check names are changed to contain the required amount of crystals. Kukiel will also appear in Batreaux's house, telling you what the shuffled crystal counts are. - Batreaux progression option is now a range 0-7, which will determine how many of Batreaux's rewards can possibly contain progression items. - If set to 0, no Batreaux rewards can contain progression items. - If set to 7, all Batreaux rewards could contain progression items. - If set to any number (n) between 0 and 7, then the first (n) rewards could contain progression items, and the highest rewards will not contain progression items. - Print client messages in-game ( by YourAverageLink - see [#21](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/21) ) - A cosmetic option has been added to the patcher to allow client messages in-game to be turned on or off before iso generation. - If turned on, client messages will be printed in-game in the bottom left corner of the screen. - Fix for incorrect hints ( by Harmjan387 - see [issue #22](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SS_APWorld/issues/22) and [PR #28](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/28) ) - Separate option for Lanayru Caves Small Key - moved away from dungeon small keys - New option has choices "Start With", "Caves", "Lanayru", and "Anywhere". All options will ensure that you will not be locked out of sand sea / lanayru desert / and so on, no matter where your starting statue or entrance is. - APWorld is now auto-generated by a github workflow, like the patcher build is. - Added an icon to the Skyward Sword client on the Archipelago launcher - Fix for APPlayerContainer issue in AP 0.6.2 - Update to AP 0.6.2
## What has changed? (v0.5.1) - Fixes for issues during seed generation: #20 - Logic fixes - Update to AP 0.6.1
## What has changed? (v0.5.0) - Logic has been rewritten to support entrance randomization. There will likely be logic bugs floating around, some may not have a significant impact while some may end your run. Hence, **use at your own risk!** - Random starting statues and random starting entrance options are now fully supported. - The itempool generation has been changed significantly, fixing several bugs regarding starting items and item placements. Although it is unlikely, there may be bugs that were created as a result. - Single crystals have been added as AP-recognized checks, however they will remain as single gratitude crystals for the time being. In the future, these checks may be randomized, for now they have been added to support single crystal logic. - Code has been cleaned up.
gl, hf! -bcats
### Downloads:
[RECOMMENDED] The zip file containing the apworld, YAML, and setup guides (ss_apworld-v0.5.5.zip) [RECOMMENDED] The patcher build (SS_APPatcher-v0.5.5.zip)
The apworld file (ss.apworld) The template YAML file (Skyward.Sword.yaml) *The above two files are contained in the first zip, and do not need to be downloaded if you download the apworld zip*

entry.title: Okami HD v0.5.0rc1
entry.content:
## What's Changed * Add City Checkpoint logic by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/54 * Add Ryoshima coast logic by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/55 * Add Sunken Ship Logic by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/69 * Add Imperial Palace Logic by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/73 * Add Seian city commoners logic by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/59
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/compare/0.4.5...0.5.0-preview-1

entry.title: Deltarune v2.0.0+pre.release.1c
entry.content: Fix Unlock chapter logic missing and chapter 2 start logic being wrong

entry.title: Old School Runescape v1
entry.content:
Adds Bingo Board * Optional as exclusive goal, or just added to the normal DS1 goal
Includes logic update v2.1.0 Plando will now force locations to exist if it can A few new cool UT features for OSRS (mostly bingo though)
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FarisTheAncient/Archipelago/commits/osrs-bingo-RC1

entry.title: Taskipelago v0.9
entry.content:
# Taskipelago/Taskipelabingo Version 0.9 ### *Making way for 1.0!* NOTE: This version is not backwards compatible with any existing v0.8.x multiworlds that utilize progression groups.
## Features, Improvements, and Changes * Added the abillity to define task regions with dependencies on a percentage of region completed, or a number of tasks in a given region completed. * Added the ability to define consumable items, which can be used to purchase a task as defined by its cost. * Reworked the YAML generation screen and added a tutorial for all of you lovely newcomers :) * Added item history and clean up notifications on disconnect
## Looking forward: Planned features for v1.0 As we are approaching the point where I feel comfortable moving out of beta and calling it a stable 1.0 build, I want to include my future plans here, partially for my own organization, but also with the intent of receiving feedback on the ideas and suggestions for things not listed. Please provide feedback in the discussion for this release, or in the Taskipelago thread in the Archipelago discord server's future-game-design forum. Feel free to @xlander36 on that to ensure I see it in a timely manner. More information on these can be found in the TODO.md file.
* Pomodoro-sanity mode where all tasks are given a pomodoro rating, and pomodoro completions become locations. This will include a built-in pomodoro timer. * Import from csv/xls option

entry.title: Cookie Clicker v0.8.2
entry.content:
This release's main focus is on bugfixes and quality of life tooling. 0.8.2 **IS** compatible with previous 0.8.x versions. It is **recommended** to update your userscript from these versions to this one. ## Fixes - In some cases, unlocked items were not reapplied properly - 2nd and 3rd Progressive Cursors did nothing - Lumps multiplier would stack after each ascension. Yes I fixed it sorry.........
## Changes - Add a button to resend all checks - Add a button to check your goal - Script can now be installed/updated in just 2 clicks ! No more copy-pasting :)

entry.title: Sonic Battle v0.1.4
entry.content: ## Updates since last release - Added ability rings for special moves - Added crystal ring item - Added Ichikoro ring - Fixed a couple logic errors

entry.title: Metroid Prime v0.5.4
entry.content:
# Apworld changes : - Added new command `/export_iso` which allows the user to reexport their iso if they started the client from the apmp1 file - Made the zip build optional for releases - Now the update lib function will clear properly old versions
# Logic has been updated : - Fixed a bug where Ruined Courtyard to Quarantine Access would bypass the door requirement if the trick for climbing there was set. - Fixed a bug where Ruined Nursery would expect Power Bombs to break crates when it's completely impossible
# Library changes : - Updated py-randomprime to 1.31.1 - Updated ppc-asm to 1.9.0
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/UltiNaruto/MetroidAPrime/compare/v0.5.4...v0.5.4-h1

entry.title: Pizza Tower v1.3.3
entry.content:
# Pizza Tower Archipelago v1.3.3 [Setup](https://github.com/unsafetyskizzers/Archipelago/blob/pizza_ap/worlds/pizza_tower/docs/setup_en.md) | [Mod Page](https://gamebanana.com/mods/598236)
Hotfix for a generation failure related to the S/P Rank chef task locations. Only the apworld has been modified this time, though there's a new mod release to sync the versions
- Fixed S/P ranked chef task locations failing generation if S/P rank checks were not enabled - Template options now generate properly

entry.title: League of Legends v0.2.3
entry.content: ### Features - "Auto Select Teammates" checkbox to select all teammates automatically - Champion with hinted checks row color is now cyan ### Bugfixes - Fixing client freeze bug when loading too many items - Fixing false goal bug when switching from a goaled LoL AP slot to another one - Fixing impossible goal bug when lp_count * requiered_lp % had a result under 1

entry.title: Plok v0.1.2
entry.content: ## Updates from last release - Added extra support for the [Plok Poptracker Pack](https://github.com/Happyhappyism/Plok_Tracker/releases)

entry.title: Manual_BlockTales_WolfBoi008 v6.0.0rc2
entry.content: # Known Issues None for now... # Changelog - Added all content correlating to the Mutant Optional Boss. - Fixed the Chapter 5 Goal to actually be finishing Chapter 5 now. - Added an extra Pack Tactics to the item pool that wasn't there before. # What's Missing? - Chatsanity for most of Chapter 4 + some of Chapter 5 - This may not be in 6.0.0, to save me some sanity... - Checks related to Finn McCool - I have yet to beat him myself, admittedly... - Anything else I may not be thinking of...?

entry.title: Dark Cloud 1 v0.5.0
entry.content:
# Dark Cloud 1 AP Rando v0.5.3
## Change - Was overzealous in my attempts to prevent duplicate items and broke the ability to receive certain georama. This has been resolved.
No changes to .apworld. Games started on 0.5.2 will likely need to restart to continue, or have the server send the amount that were already received again with /send_multiple.

entry.title: Mario Kart Double Dash v1.0.0rc4
entry.content:
One more release candidate for the upcoming 1.0.0 update. Amount of bug reports has been getting low, so this might very well be the one! **NOTE**: This is prerelease version, there might be bugs!
Known problems: incompatible with gecko codes.
Download a new apworld and options template below and have a good one! If this is your first time playing MKDD AP, here's the [setup guide](docs/en_Setup.md) and [readme](https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash).
## New Features * See [v1.0.0rc1](https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/releases/tag/v1.0.0rc1) for things new for v1.0.0 ## Fixes * Fix Dolphin cache problems * This has been the biggest headache for the longest time, but I think now I have found a good solution. The client tries to invalidate the cache in 3 places: when entering the main menu, when entering character menu and as a last resort when pausing the game. * Fix item limit code not working * Fix for fireball glitch wasn't complete due to an oversight! * Prevent checks in invalid state * The client won't give you checks for doing time trials when time trials are disabled, or other bad states like opening the client during a race. * Fix TT pause menu times formatting * Adjust Mushroom City shortcut time limit
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/compare/v1.0.0rc3...v1.0.0rc4

entry.title: R.E.P.O v0.4.1
entry.content:
Mod: * fixed an issue with setting up the network handler * valuables in the hauler inventory now complete locations
This version will work with multiworlds from 0.4.0 and above.

entry.title: Taskipelago v0.9.1
entry.content: # Taskipelago/Taskipelabingo Version 0.9.1 Quick patch: * Allow sections to collapse on YAML generator for better editing on smaller screens * Fix issues with item/task balance counter * Added "Send Deathlink" button when deathlink is enabled. Use at your own risk, don't make your friends mad * Fix scrolling issue

entry.title: Astalon v0.99.2
entry.content:
- Fix using the GT1 elevator when starting at Gorgon Tomb - This is a mod-only fix, the apworld is the same as rc2
**More Information**: https://github.com/drtchops/Archipelago/blob/astalon/worlds/astalon/docs/en_Astalon.md **Setup Guide**: https://github.com/drtchops/Archipelago/blob/astalon/worlds/astalon/docs/setup_en.md **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/drtchops/Archipelago-Astalon/compare/v1.0.0-rc2...v1.0.0-rc3

entry.title: TCG Card Shop Simulator v1.0.0rc4
entry.content:
AP World for v1.0.0
This is for testing only. generation problems and more beware. UT is now supported.
[AP Client](https://github.com/FyreDay/TCG-CardShop-Sim-APClient/releases/tag/v1.0.0-Pre4)
- Added bulk boxes - Fix rules typo

entry.title: Dark Cloud 1 v0.5.0
entry.content:
# Dark Cloud 1 AP Rando v0.5.4
## Changes - Further small improvements to generation time; doesn't impact tracker logic but likely results in different item placement so trackers may get confused for old worlds but should still work. - Fixed a rare client side bug preventing sending goal. - Fixed a bug preventing the final floor of the final dungeon from sending atla locations.
Should work with old worlds. Games started on 0.5.2 will likely need to restart to continue, or have the server send the amount that were already received again with /send_multiple.

entry.title: Schedule I v3.6.3
entry.content:
Non-breaking logic changes made: We need to cook is now 1 region and requires: Warehouse access when randomized level unlocks, Meg Cooley or Jerry Montero if randomized customers and NOT randomized suppliers, Shirley watts if randomized suppliers
Locations for chemist now all only require warehouse access because chem station is no longer locked behind rank restriction.

entry.title: Manual_FantasyLife_JBtheShadow v1.0.0
TCG Card Shop Simulator v1.0.0rc5
entry.content:
AP World for v1.0.0
This is for testing only. generation problems and more beware. UT is now supported.
[AP Client](https://github.com/FyreDay/TCG-CardShop-Sim-APClient/releases/tag/v1.0.0-Pre7)
- ordered options - small logic updates

entry.title: Metroid Fusion v1.22.4
entry.content:
## Changes
* Fix another longstanding logic issue expecting you to descend s2 without hi/space jump in a non-ponr yaml * Fix expected reverse access to charge core arena without morph (to kill the stabiliser) * Open the issues section on GitHub, set up two templates, and remove the three default templates * Fix a logic bug with boss immunity handling, mainly known to affect Nettori (@NPCPotPie) * Actually upload the right version this time 😅
Setup guide link: [here](https://github.com/StalledStorm/ArchipelagoMine/wiki/Metroid-Fusion-Setup-Guide)

entry.title: Muse Dash v1.5.33
entry.content:
# Changes - Update songs to Touhou Mugakudan -V-
# Installation ## Melonloader *Melonloader is required to play with this mod. However reinstalling it is not required on update.*
> You can find Muse Dash's folder by finding the game in your steam library, right clicking it and choosing *Manage→Browse Local Files*.
### Windows 1. Download `MelonLoader.Installer.exe` from https://github.com/LavaGang/MelonLoader/releases/latest and run it. 2. Select Muse Dash in the list of games. - If Muse Dash does not appear, click add game manually then browse to `MuseDash.exe`. 3. Click install. - If the latest version is not working: **Untick Latest and select 0.7.2**
### Linux 1. Navigate to Muse Dash on steam, open properties and add the following to Launch Options: `WINEDLLOVERRIDES="version=n,b" %command%` 2. Download `MelonLoader.Installer.Linux` from https://github.com/LavaGang/MelonLoader/releases/latest and run it. - You may need to give it permissions to execute. 3. Select Muse Dash in the list of games. - If Muse Dash does not appear, click add game manually then browse to `MuseDash.exe`. 4. Click install. On first run, melonloader may install dotnet 6 in order to run. - If the latest version is not working: **Untick Latest and select 0.7.2**
### Mod Install 1.Download `ArchipelagoMuseDash.zip`. 2. Head to the Muse Dash folder and open up `/mods/`. If this folder does not exist, run the game and it should appear. 3. Extract the contents of the .zip file into mods. Ensure the files are not in a subfolder, this mod is not setup for that yet. 4. Run the game. If a new button appears on the start screen the mod was installed correctly.

entry.title: Donkey Kong 64 v1.5.7
entry.content:
DK64 Randomizer APWorld file for Archipelago version 1.5.7
This release contains the dk64.apworld file that can be used with the Archipelago multiworld randomizer.

entry.title: UNBEATABLE Arcade v0.5.0a0
entry.content:
This is a very small update, adding the new songs from UNBEATABLE v1.10. Also, releases are now being handled by me, @estradiol-valerate, or Maya in the UNBEATABLE Discord thread linked at the bottom.
New songs: - small cloud sugar candy - apb
The client is **compatible** with v0.4.0 apworlds! You can update the mod even if you're currently in an async! The **apworld** is **NOT compatible** with v0.4.0 clients! If you generate a game with the v0.5.0 apworld, you must use the v0.5.0 client mod!
Check [the README](https://github.com/AllPoland/unbeatAP/blob/main/README.md) for installation instructions.
**Please read the YAML options carefully and test your options before joining a lobby**, since the pacing and difficulty of the apworld is very volatile. It's currently very easy to make a randomizer that is way too short or way too long.
Any feedback or ideas are welcome in the "UNBEATABLE (PC)" thread in `#future-game-design` in the [Archipelago Discord](https://discord.gg/8Z65BR2)!

entry.title: Spyro 2 v2.0.1rc1
entry.content:
This release modifies both the Duckstation client (S2AP.Desktop.exe) and the APWorld. You must update both to use this version.
This is a release candidate; it has been tested less than a full release, and feature are subject to change before the final release, which is expected in the near future.
New Features: - Music Shuffle option - Logic Changes around world warps, an option to remove the Professor’s door lock in Autumn Plains, and a new trick to get on the Autumn Plains wall with nothing, programmed by Phoenix - New options around Sparx powers - Lazy Sparx Trap
Changes - When trap chance > 0 but no traps are enabled, generation now proceeds with trap chance = 0 - [Duckstation] Added setup warning to disable runahead, which could overwrite cosmetic changes.
Bug Fixes - Fixed a bug where Sparx health upgrades obtained while not connected could desync max Sparx health - [Bizhawk] Fixed a bug where dragon shores token locations did not send when they were not required for the goal. - Fixed a bug that could corrupt cutscenes in a couple levels - Fixed a bug where Aquaria Tower sharks did not trigger deathlink - Fixed a bug where in gemsanity, 400/400 could flash on screen many times - Fixed a typo in a gemsanity option (thanks to Slumpymaster!)

entry.title: Dicey Dungeons v0.4.0b0
entry.content:
## What's Changed * Robot by @Fylcoast in https://github.com/Fylcoast/AP_diceydungeons/pull/84
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Fylcoast/AP_diceydungeons/compare/v0.3.2-beta...v0.4.0-beta

entry.title: Deltarune v2.0.0+pre.release.2
entry.content: Here we are ! Last pre-release before the real 2.0.0 ! (And a real complete changelog)

entry.title: Banjo Tooie v4.12.0
entry.content: # 4.12.0 - Huge thanks to Umed and the DK64 Crew (specifically the randomizer team), we now support a handful of emulators! - Tested emulators includes: - Project64 3.0.1 and 4.0 - Luna64 - Bizhawk 2.10 (companion lua script available to recover from Bizhawk Crashes) - RMG - Dpad-Up Banjo TipToe feature is now a ROM feature. - Review our [setup documentation](https://github.com/jjjj12212/Archipelago-BanjoTooie/blob/main/worlds/banjo_tooie/docs/setup_en.md) for recommended settings for the tested emulators.

entry.title: Dark Souls Remastered v0.1.4
entry.content:
# **Dark Souls Remastered Apworld & Client v0.1.4**
## More Goals, Multipliers, and Map Tracking
### Version update -> 0.1.4. Both apworld and client have updated. Client should be compatible with all 0.1.x generated apworlds.
## New features: * More `goal_condition`s! Ornstein & Smough, Manus. Added along with `After O+S` location group - to exclude if you're using the O+S goal; this will exclude all normally Post-Lordvessel checks. `/goalcheck` will tell you what your goal is. * Add `Soul Multiplier` and `Weight Multiplier` options - configurable via yaml option to be either be a static multiplier or require an option-defined number of "progressive" items to increase souls or reduce weight. Min/Max soul multipler is 20% to 500%, weight multiplier is 300% to 0%. Defaults are 100% for both and no such "progressive items". Soul multiplier changes via progressive item may not take effect until enemies are reloaded. * Tracker Map Auto Tabbing is available (and immediately available via Universal Tracker, using the Poptracker map pack). Controls also added to turn off sending this information from the client (e.g. for co-op). * Added `Item Lot Param` consistency check - should help catch issues if players didn't clean up their install after using a randomizer or other Param modifier (if they read the red error messages upon connect!)
## Fixes: * Send boss fogwall checks if their respective boss is killed without passing through it. You can now safely cheese the bosses (or try weird fog wall skips) * Bonfire warp items (mainly used for debugging) weren't working, and Catacombs and Chasm of the Abyss were swapped. Warning: these items are still not normally placed, nor considered for logic.

entry.title: HyperRogue v0.2.0
entry.content:
Version 0.2 is here!
You can now add extra locations for 10, 25 and 50 treasures in each land. To make up for these, filler items were introduced: Currently, an adjustable percentage of filler items are replaced by Orbs in your starting inventory. More Filler items hopefully soon to follow.
Also fixed two logic errors.

entry.title: Manual_BlockTales_WolfBoi008 v6.0.0
entry.content:
Here we go, finally caught up to the present day! # Known Issues None for now... # Changelog - **Added Chapter 5 Content.** - This also includes increasing the counts of some Cards since some have additional copies in Chapter 5. - Fixed some BUX not having I Spy Logic when they should've, mainly within Chapter 4. - **Tweaked the logic of some Checks to remove all instances of `{CanReachLocation()}`, to minimize gen time as much as possible.** - Added a Check for the Ankh Item that's in the Temple of the Red Sun. (@FNatFmaster) - There are now 60 BUX in the Item pool instead of 50, since the game now has that many as of DEMO 5. - Added a Check for the Pirate Spirit enemy that Trotter summons in his boss battle. - Added some missing Cutscenes and other Checks regarding Cruel King DX. - Added Levelsanity for Chapters 4 and 5 and adjusted the existing Levelsanity following FNaF's documentation. - This is subject to change depending on player feedback. - Actually fixed the Loyal Knight Check _for real_ this time. - I accidentally changed the Category but not the Region. - Added Finn McCool Content. (@FNatFmaster) - Related note: I finally beat him solo! Windforce is so good for him when you're alone, my god. - **Changed the logic of the Bizville BUX Shop. It now requires Chapter 4 to be completed along with the usual 50 BUX.** - As a result, the BUX Shop will not be part of the Multiworld unless PostGoal Content is active or Chapter 5/The Pit is your Goal. - Potentially a few other miscellaneous changes. # What's Still Missing? - Some of Chapter 4 and 5's Chatsanity. - Will likely add this in a patch when I have some more free time on my hands. - The BUX Shop in Chapter 5. - This won't be added until more updates to the game come out. May try to add it in DEMO 6, depending on how many BUX get added by then.
Thank you all for waiting for these last two major updates. It means a lot to me! I'm gonna go start my new job now and then take a nap, hope you all enjoy!

entry.title: Tyrian v1.0.5
entry.content:
This is a hotfix release, compatible with games generated with previous 1.0.x versions.
## Changelog
- Fixed not being able to connect to a game that was generated with shops disabled. - Fixed the world's smallest typo. (The C in "Zica SuperCharger" is actually supposed to be capitalized.)

entry.title: Refunct v1.2.0
entry.content:
# Version 1.2.0 - Memes and Fixes! Don't believe what the title says, there are no memes whatsoever. ## Additions - Funny Bridge Game Minigame: inspired by Squid Game, can you pick the correct tiles and survive the RNG bridge? The prize: 1 check! - Clique Minigame: you know Clique? An Archipelago game all about pressing a button! There is one free item on the ~~desk~~ platform, and then another item for pressing the button. But the button activation item needs to be found first! - Just Clique: tired of Refunct? Enable this option and the *entire* game will *just* be Clique! - Two "testing" levels are added: one "frogger" and one "beat block". You can find them when you are connected to any Refunct game. Check them out if you have time and let me know what you think and if you have ideas :3 ## Fixes - Deathlinks are only sent when the last one was at least 3 seconds ago. - Flowers that are forced into minigames are now correctly replaced by traps or english/latin names. - Incremented max number of minigames to 14.
Readme: https://github.com/spinerak/refunct-tas-archipelago/blob/master/README.md

entry.title: Refunct v1.2.1
entry.content:
### v1.2.0 -> v1.2.1 - Made flowers filler again (whoops)
# Version 1.1.x->1.2.0 - Memes and Fixes! Don't believe what the title says, there are no memes whatsoever. ## Additions - Funny Bridge Game Minigame: inspired by Squid Game, can you pick the correct tiles and survive the RNG bridge? The prize: 1 check! - Clique Minigame: you know Clique? An Archipelago game all about pressing a button! There is one free item on the ~~desk~~ platform, and then another item for pressing the button. But the button activation item needs to be found first! - Just Clique: tired of Refunct? Enable this option and the *entire* game will *just* be Clique! - Two "testing" levels are added: one "frogger" and one "beat block". You can find them when you are connected to any Refunct game. Check them out if you have time and let me know what you think and if you have ideas :3 ## Fixes - Deathlinks are only sent when the last one was at least 3 seconds ago. - Flowers that are forced into minigames are now correctly replaced by traps or english/latin names. - Incremented max number of minigames to 14.
Readme: https://github.com/spinerak/refunct-tas-archipelago/blob/master/README.md

entry.title: Crystal Project v0.16.0

author.name: Dragons but also Rabbits, FabulaFey, Emerassi

entry.content:
### **Crystal Project v. 0.16.0** <https://github.com/Emerassi/CrystalProjectAPWorld/releases>
### 🚨 AP World Update 🚨
New YAML Option EarnedItemInfoPercent, controls the percent of checks that must be collected to earn item into mode when ItemInfoMode is set to earned Various location accessability fixes
### 🚨 AP Mod Update 🚨 Fix for Sky Arena sending boss completion early when kill bosses is enabled Updated locations menu to show Ool icon for hinted checks if location is not in logic
### KNOWN ISSUES - Receiving a passive point cap increase does not update the available passive points until a passive is toggled on or off. - Mods that change the text scrolls (such as the intro in spawning meadows) may result in unexpected behaviour

entry.title: TCG Card Shop Simulator v1.1.0rc0
entry.content:
AP World for v1.0.0
This is a stable version of the code. If this has no major issues it will be released soon.
reminder: UT is now supported.
[AP Client](https://github.com/FyreDay/TCG-CardShop-Sim-APClient/releases/tag/v1.1.0-Candidate1)
- fix options creator - fix versioning issue - fix play tables name to id

entry.title: Total War Warhammer 3 v0.9.12
entry.content:
Fixed black arks buildings not registering in sanity. Added new in-game hinting for sanity (have not tested in spheres mode).
Installation instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/README.md). [FAQ](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/FAQ.md).
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/compare/v0.9.11...v0.9.12
